summary: Backend: 27/27 pytest cases passed covering auth, role enforcement, admin dealers/templates/clients/stats CRUD, dealer client/template/stats flows, wallet credit/debit, template-id filtering, plan enum validation, cascade delete. Frontend: admin login -> /admin dashboard works, nav to Dealers/Templates/Clients works, logout returns to /login. Dealer login from UI got stuck on 'Signing in...' once and final URL stayed on /login (possible flake; backend dealer login confirmed working via pytest and frontend admin login is fine).

integration_issues.issue: After clicking Sign in as dealer@demo.com/dealer123, page remained on /login with button stuck on 'Signing in...'. Backend POST /api/auth/login for dealer works (verified). Likely a one-off timing/state issue after admin logout in same session. Worth re-running and confirming AuthContext properly sets token on successful login.

action_items: Manually re-verify dealer login flow on frontend (admin works fine). If reproducible, inspect AuthContext.login success path/redirect logic for /dealer.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py wallet credit/debit (POST /dealer/clients/{id}/credit) is not atomic — race between debit and credit could leave inconsistent state on failure. Consider transaction or compensating action.
Admin can credit a dealer wallet but there is no debit/adjust endpoint (only $inc add). Could be a feature gap.

FRONTEND_URL in backend/.env points to 6dbd5dca-... while frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is dealer-client-mgmt.preview.emergentagent.com. CORS allow_origins won't include the actual frontend origin if frontend is served from dealer-client-mgmt domain. Tests passed because requests use Bearer token from JS, not cookies; but cross-site cookie auth won't work unless FRONTEND_URL matches the actual frontend origin. RECOMMEND aligning FRONTEND_URL with the served frontend URL.
Plan distribution in admin/stats only counts dealer plans, not clients. Naming is ambiguous.
delete_template cascade pulls ids from clients but not from dealers — fine since dealers don't carry template ids, but worth a comment.
seed_data_creation: All test data created in pytest used TEST_ prefix and was cleaned up (dealers/templates/clients deleted at end of each test class).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_signage_admin.py (27 passing). On retest, focus on dealer UI login flow specifically: open /login, fill dealer@demo.com/dealer123, submit, verify redirect to /dealer and dealer stats KPIs render. Then exercise dealer client CRUD + credit. Note backend FRONTEND_URL mismatch — CORS-with-credentials may break if frontend served from another preview URL.
